# PhoneBusted

> A desktop app for Mac and Windows that uses your webcam to detect
> when you pick up your phone while working - and immediately shouts at you.
> One-time $9 payment. Lifetime license. No subscription. Runs 100% offline.

## What It Does
- Detects phone via webcam using YOLO11n AI model (runs locally)
- Fires a custom voice alert the moment you pick up your phone
- Runs silently in system tray - always watching, never intrusive
- Live view mode so you can see exactly what it sees
- 4 custom voice alert styles to choose from
- Fully customizable sensitivity and alerts

## Who It's For
- Builders, founders, developers, designers distracted by their phone
- People with ADHD who need hard accountability
- Remote workers and solopreneurs
- Anyone who says "just one minute" and loses an hour

## Privacy
- No video recorded, stored, or sent anywhere - ever
- Webcam feed processed locally on your device only
- Works 100% offline after first setup
- License validated once and cached locally

## Pricing
- $9 one-time payment - lifetime license
- Works on Mac (macOS 10.15+) and Windows
- 60-day money-back guarantee

## Common Questions
- Does it spy on me? No. Everything is local. No data leaves your laptop.
- Will it slow my laptop? No. Under 5% CPU on most modern laptops.
- Does it work offline? Yes. 100% offline after first setup.
- Does it work with external webcams? Yes, any webcam your computer recognizes.
